infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Eat and Fit requires access to your historical health metrics to automatically calculate and graph your weekly workout consistency on your active tracking dashboard.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Eat and Fit requires permissions to log calculated dietary intake parameters directly to your Apple Health index when requested.
